raw_response:
I fully agree with the assessment. The definition given accurately reflects what the rake angle measures—specifically, the orientation of the rake face relative to the direction of chip expulsion—and matches this precise description among all other possible angles mentioned like clearance, spiral etc., which serve different purposes but do not describe this particular measurement. Therefore, my final answer remains consistent with option B: Rake angle. Agent1’s explanation was clear and comprehensive.
